reviews.comment:
Reposté combustible y merendé cafecito. Amable atención de la playa y el full.
Hay hotel y zona de estacionamiento.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up my tank and had a coffee. Friendly service at the beach and the full service area.
There's a hotel and parking available.
